            <style>
             .image-container {
                background-color: #E5E5E9;
                border-radius: 10px;
                position: relative;
                z-index: 1;
                overflow: hidden;
              }
              #overlay_text {
                width: 100%;
                text-align: center;
                margin-left: -20px;
                z-index: 3;
                color: #A1AD62;
                font-weight: bolder;
                font-size: 2.5em;
                text-shadow: 1px 1px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.43);
                -webkit-text-stroke: 1.5px#ffffff;
              }
              @media all and (max-width: 1140px) {
                #overlay_text {
                  margin-left: -12px;
                  font-size: 1.8em;
                }
              }
              @media all and (max-width: 836px) {
                #overlay_text {
                  margin-left: -12px;
                  font-size: 1.5em;
                }
              }
              @media all and (max-width: 749px) {
                #overlay_text {
                  margin-left: -20px;
                  font-size: 2.5em;
                }
              }
              @media all and (max-width: 530px) {
                #overlay_text {
                  margin-left: -20px;
                  font-size: 2em;
                }
              }
              @media all and (max-width: 530px) {
                #overlay_text {
                  margin-left: -15px;
                  font-size: 1.7em;
                }
              }
              @media all and (max-width: 375px) {
                #overlay_text {
                  margin-left: -10px;
                  font-size: 1em;
                }
              }
            </style>
            <noscript>
             <img alt="hidden - GMK MTNU WoB black keycaps with white legends on black TKL keyboard" class="grid-view-item__image" src="//novelkeys.com/cdn/shop/files/GMK_MTNU_WoB_{width}x.png?v=1771424350"/>
            </noscript>
           </div>
           <a href="/collections/keycaps/products/gmk-mtnu-wob-keycaps">
            <span class="visually-hidden">
             GMK MTNU WoB
            </span>
            <div class="product-card-details-grid">
             <div style="grid-row: 1/3">
              <div aria-hidden="true" class="h4 grid-view-item__title product-card__title" style="display: flex; text-align: left;">
               GMK MTNU WOB
              </div>
              <div aria-hidden="true" class="h4 grid-view-item__title product-card__subtitle" style="color: #999999; text-align: left; display: flex; padding-top: 5px;">
               GMK PBT Double-Shot Keycaps
              </div>
             </div>
             <div class="price-item price price__regular price-item--regular product-card-price" data-product-id="8730434732199" data-regular-price="" style="text-align: right; justify-content: flex-end">
              $180
             </div>
            </div>
           </a>
          </div>
         </div>
         <!-- close product-card__quick-add-wrapper -->
         <script>
          (function() {
  // Only initialize once - this script runs per product card
  if (window.productCardScriptInitialized) return;
  window.productCardScriptInitialized = true;

  // Handle preorder agreement checkboxes - use event delegation for tooltips moved to body
  document.addEventListener('change', function(e) {
    if (!e.target.classList.contains('preorder-agreement-checkbox')) return;

    const checkbox = e.target;
    const productId = checkbox.getAttribute('data-product-id');
    const quickAddBtn = document.querySelector(`.quick-add-btn[data-product-id="${productId}"][data-preorder="true"]`);

    if (quickAddBtn) {
      if (checkbox.checked) {
        quickAddBtn.disabled = false;
        quickAddBtn.style.cursor = 'pointer';
      } else {
        quickAddBtn.disabled = true;
        quickAddBtn.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
      }
    }
  });

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {

    // Function to close all open tooltips and reset state - make it global
    window.closeAllTooltips = function() {
      const visibleTooltips = document.querySelectorAll('.preorder-tooltip.visible, .instock-conflict-tooltip.visible');

      visibleTooltips.forEach(tooltip => {
        tooltip.classList.remove('visible');
        // Reset pointer-events so tooltip doesn't block taps on wrapper below
        tooltip.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
      });

      document.querySelectorAll('.tooltip-active').forEach(el => {
        el.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
      });

      // Re-enable in-stock conflict buttons
      const disabledBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.quick-add-btn.instock-conflict-disabled');

      disabledBtns.forEach(btn => {
        btn.classList.remove('instock-conflict-disabled');
        btn.classList.remove('error');
        btn.classList.remove('loading');
        btn.disabled = false;
      });

      document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('tooltips:closed'));
    };

    // Global click handler to close orphaned tooltips when clicking outside
    document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      // Don't close if clicking inside a tooltip or quick-add area
      if (e.target.closest('.preorder-tooltip') || e.target.closest('.instock-conflict-tooltip') || e.target.closest('.quick-add-btn-wrapper')) {
        return;
      }
      window.closeAllTooltips();
    });

    // Close tooltips on scroll - immediate for responsiveness
    window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
      window.closeAllTooltips();
    }, { passive: true });

    // Global cart preorder check - shared across all products
    let globalCartHasPreorder = false;
    let globalCartCheckPromise = null;

    // Global cache version - incremented when cart changes to invalidate all caches
    let globalCacheVersion = 0;

    // Track when add-to-cart is in progress so tooltips can wait
    let addToCartInProgress = null; // Will hold a promise that resolves when add-to-cart completes

    // Expose global function to invalidate cart conflict caches
    // triggerCheck: if true, immediately start a fresh check; if false, just invalidate
    window.invalidateCartConflictCache = function(triggerCheck = true) {
      globalCacheVersion++;
      globalCartCheckPromise = null;
      // Trigger a fresh check if requested
      if (triggerCheck) {
        globalCartCheckPromise = checkCartForPreorders();
      }
    };

    // Expose function to signal add-to-cart started
    window.cartOperationStarted = function() {
      let resolveOperation;
      addToCartInProgress = new Promise(resolve => { resolveOperation = resolve; });
      return resolveOperation; // Return the resolve function to be called when complete
    };

    // Get the current add-to-cart promise (if any)
    window.getCartOperationPromise = function() {
      return addToCartInProgress;
    };

    // Clear the add-to-cart promise
    window.cartOperationCompleted = function() {
      addToCartInProgress = null;
    };

    // Expose function to check if cart has preorder (for blocking in-stock adds)
    window.checkCartHasPreorder = async function() {
      // If we already know from cache and it's recent, use that
      if (globalCartCheckPromise) {
        return await globalCartCheckPromise;
      }
      // Otherwise do a fresh check
      globalCartCheckPromise = checkCartForPreorders();
      return await globalCartCheckPromise;
    };

    async function checkCartForPreorders() {
      try {
        const response = await fetch('/cart.js');
        const cart = await response.json();

        if (cart.item_count === 0) {
          globalCartHasPreorder = false;
          return false;
        }

        // Check each item for preorder property (set when adding preorder items to cart)
        for (const item of cart.items) {
          // Check for _preorder property which is set when adding preorder/group-buy items
          if (item.properties && item.properties._preorder === 'true') {
            globalCartHasPreorder = true;
            return true;
          }
        }

        globalCartHasPreorder = false;
        return false;
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error checking cart for preorders:', error);
        return false;
      }
    }

    // Clear cart functionality
    async function clearCart() {
      // IMMEDIATELY invalidate cache when cart operation starts
      // This prevents race conditions where hover checks return stale data
      globalCartCheckPromise = null;
      globalCacheVersion++;

      // Signal cart operation started (so hover handlers wait)
      let completeOperation = null;
      if (window.cartOperationStarted) {
        completeOperation = window.cartOperationStarted();
      }

      try {
        const response = await fetch('/cart/clear.js', {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
        });

        if (response.ok) {
          // Reset global cart state
          globalCartHasPreorder = false;

          // Update cart count display
          const cartCountEl = document.querySelector('#CartCount');
          if (cartCountEl) {
            const countSpan = cartCountEl.querySelector('span:first-child');
            if (countSpan) countSpan.textContent = '0';
            cartCountEl.classList.add('hidden-count');
          }
          document.querySelectorAll('[data-cart-count], .cart-count').forEach(el => {
            el.textContent = '0';
          });

          // Reset all conflict states
          resetAllConflictStates();

          // Signal cart operation completed
          if (completeOperation) completeOperation();
          if (window.cartOperationCompleted) window.cartOperationCompleted();

          return true;
        }

        // Signal cart operation completed (even on non-ok response)
        if (completeOperation) completeOperation();
        if (window.cartOperationCompleted) window.cartOperationCompleted();

        return false;
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error clearing cart:', error);

        // Signal cart operation completed (even on error)
        if (completeOperation) completeOperation();
        if (window.cartOperationCompleted) window.cartOperationCompleted();

        return false;
      }
    }

    // Reset all conflict states across all product cards
    function resetAllConflictStates() {
      // Reset preorder tooltips
      document.querySelectorAll('.preorder-tooltip').forEach(tooltip => {
        tooltip.classList.remove('has-conflict', 'visible');
        const agreementText = tooltip.querySelector('.preorder-agreement-text');
        const agreementLabel = tooltip.querySelector('.preorder-agreement-label');
        const conflictEl = tooltip.querySelector('.preorder-cart-conflict');
        const originalText = agreementText?.getAttribute('data-original-text');

        if (agreementText && originalText) agreementText.innerHTML = originalText;
        if (agreementLabel) agreementLabel.style.display = '';
        if (conflictEl) conflictEl.style.display = 'none';
      });

      // Reset in-stock conflict tooltips
      document.querySelectorAll('.instock-conflict-tooltip').forEach(tooltip => {
        tooltip.classList.remove('visible');
        tooltip.style.display = 'none';
      });

      // Reset preorder buttons to require checkbox again
      document.querySelectorAll('.quick-add-btn--preorder').forEach(btn => {
        const checkbox = document.querySelector(`.preorder-agreement-checkbox[data-product-id="${btn.dataset.productId}"]`);
        if (checkbox) {
          btn.disabled = !checkbox.checked;
          btn.style.cursor = checkbox.checked ? 'pointer' : 'not-allowed';
        }
      });

      // Reset in-stock buttons
      document.querySelectorAll('.quick-add-btn.instock-conflict-disabled').forEach(btn => {
        btn.classList.remove('instock-conflict-disabled');
        btn.disabled = false;
      });

      // Remove tooltip-active classes
      document.querySelectorAll('.tooltip-active').forEach(el => {
        el.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
      });
    }

    // Handle clear cart button clicks
    document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      const clearBtn = e.target.closest('.preorder-clear-cart-btn');
      if (!clearBtn) return;

      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();

      clearBtn.classList.add('loading');
      clearBtn.textContent = 'Clearing...';

      clearCart().then(success => {
        clearBtn.classList.remove('loading');
        clearBtn.textContent = 'Clear Cart';

        if (success) {
          const tooltip = clearBtn.closest('.preorder-tooltip, .instock-conflict-tooltip');

          if (tooltip) {
            // Check if this is an in-stock conflict tooltip
            if (tooltip.classList.contains('instock-conflict-tooltip')) {
              // For in-stock items: hide tooltip and enable button
              tooltip.classList.remove('visible');
              tooltip.style.display = 'none';

              // Find and enable the add-to-cart button using product ID
              const productId = tooltip.dataset.productId;
              const productCard = document.querySelector(`.product-card[data-product-id="${productId}"], .grid-view-item[data-product-id="${productId}"]`);
              if (productCard) {
                const btn = productCard.querySelector('.quick-add-btn:not(.quick-add-btn--preorder)');
                if (btn) {
                  btn.classList.remove('instock-conflict-disabled');
                  btn.disabled = false;
                }
                productCard.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
                const overlay = productCard.querySelector('.quick-add-overlay');
                if (overlay) overlay.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
                const wrapper = productCard.querySelector('.product-card__quick-add-wrapper');
                if (wrapper) wrapper.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
              }
            } else {
              // For preorder items: restore original agreement content
              tooltip.classList.remove('has-conflict');
              const agreementText = tooltip.querySelector('.preorder-agreement-text');
              const agreementLabel = tooltip.querySelector('.preorder-agreement-label');
              const conflictEl = tooltip.querySelector('.preorder-cart-conflict');
              const checkbox = tooltip.querySelector('.preorder-agreement-checkbox');

              // Restore original text
              if (agreementText && agreementText.dataset.originalText) {
                agreementText.innerHTML = agreementText.dataset.originalText;
              }

              // Show agreement label, hide conflict buttons
              if (agreementLabel) agreementLabel.style.display = '';
              if (conflictEl) conflictEl.style.display = 'none';

              // Reset checkbox and button state
              if (checkbox) {
                checkbox.checked = false;
                const productId = checkbox.dataset.productId;
                const addBtn = document.querySelector(`.quick-add-btn[data-product-id="${productId}"][data-preorder="true"]`);
                if (addBtn) {
                  addBtn.disabled = true;
                  addBtn.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      });
    });

    // Handle in-stock conflict tooltips (simplified)
    const instockConflictTooltips = document.querySelectorAll('.instock-conflict-tooltip');

    instockConflictTooltips.forEach(function(tooltip) {
      const wrapper = tooltip.closest('.quick-add-btn-wrapper');
      if (!wrapper) return;

      const button = wrapper.querySelector('.quick-add-btn:not(.quick-add-btn--preorder)');
      if (!button) return;

      const productCard = wrapper.closest('.product-card') || wrapper.closest('.grid-view-item');
      const quickAddOverlay = wrapper.closest('.quick-add-overlay');
      const originalParent = tooltip.parentElement;
      let isTooltipInBody = false;
      let lastCheckedVersion = -1;
      let isShowing = false;

      // Reset state when tooltips are globally closed
      document.addEventListener('tooltips:closed', function() {
        isShowing = false;
        if (isTooltipInBody) {
          originalParent.appendChild(tooltip);
          isTooltipInBody = false;
        }
      });

      // Show tooltip and position it
      async function showTooltip() {
        if (isShowing) return;
        isShowing = true;

        // Wait for any pending cart operation
        if (addToCartInProgress) {
          await addToCartInProgress;
        }

        // Check for preorder in cart
        if (lastCheckedVersion !== globalCacheVersion) {
          globalCartCheckPromise = checkCartForPreorders();
          lastCheckedVersion = globalCacheVersion;
        } else if (!globalCartCheckPromise) {
          globalCartCheckPromise = checkCartForPreorders();
        }

        const hasPreorder = await globalCartCheckPromise;

        if (!hasPreorder) {
          button.classList.remove('instock-conflict-disabled');
          button.disabled = false;
          isShowing = false;
          return;
        }

        // Show conflict tooltip
        button.classList.add('instock-conflict-disabled');
        button.disabled = true;
        tooltip.style.display = 'block';

        if (!isTooltipInBody) {
          document.body.appendChild(tooltip);
          isTooltipInBody = true;
        }

        // Position tooltip
        const buttonRect = button.getBoundingClientRect();
        const viewportWidth = window.innerWidth;
        const buttonCenterX = buttonRect.left + buttonRect.width / 2;
        let tooltipLeft = buttonCenterX;

        tooltip.style.position = 'fixed';
        tooltip.style.left = tooltipLeft + 'px';
        tooltip.style.bottom = (window.innerHeight - buttonRect.top + 10) + 'px';
        tooltip.style.pointerEvents = 'auto';

        // Reset arrow offset initially
        tooltip.style.setProperty('--arrow-offset', '0px');

        // Add active classes
        if (productCard) productCard.classList.add('tooltip-active');
        if (quickAddOverlay) quickAddOverlay.classList.add('tooltip-active');

        tooltip.classList.add('visible');

        // Edge detection - run once after render
        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
          const tooltipRect = tooltip.getBoundingClientRect();

          if (tooltipRect.right > viewportWidth - 10) {
            tooltipLeft -= (tooltipRect.right - viewportWidth + 10);
          } else if (tooltipRect.left < 10) {
            tooltipLeft += (10 - tooltipRect.left);
          }

          tooltip.style.left = tooltipLeft + 'px';

          // Calculate arrow offset to keep it pointing at button center
          const arrowOffset = buttonCenterX - tooltipLeft;
          tooltip.style.setProperty('--arrow-offset', arrowOffset + 'px');
        });
      }

      // Hide tooltip
      function hideTooltip() {
        isShowing = false;
        tooltip.classList.remove('visible');
        if (productCard) productCard.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
        if (quickAddOverlay) quickAddOverlay.classList.remove('tooltip-active');

        setTimeout(() => {
          if (isTooltipInBody && !isShowing) {
            originalParent.appendChild(tooltip);
            isTooltipInBody = false;
          }
        }, 300);
      }

      // Desktop: show on hover
      wrapper.addEventListener('mouseenter', showTooltip);
      wrapper.addEventListener('mouseleave', function(e) {
        // Don't hide if moving to tooltip
        if (e.relatedTarget && (e.relatedTarget === tooltip || tooltip.contains(e.relatedTarget))) return;
        hideTooltip();
      });

      tooltip.addEventListener('mouseleave', function(e) {
        // Don't hide if moving back to wrapper
        if (e.relatedTarget && (e.relatedTarget === wrapper || wrapper.contains(e.relatedTarget))) return;
        hideTooltip();
      });
    });

    // Pre-fetch cart preorder status on page load
    setTimeout(() => {
      globalCartCheckPromise = checkCartForPreorders();
    }, 200);

    // Handle tooltip edge detection and repositioning
    const tooltipWrappers = document.querySelectorAll('.quick-add-btn-wrapper');

    tooltipWrappers.forEach(function(wrapper, index) {
      const tooltip = wrapper.querySelector('.preorder-tooltip');
      if (!tooltip) return;

      const tooltipContent = tooltip.querySelector('.preorder-tooltip-content');
      if (!tooltipContent) return;

      // Store original parent for returning tooltip
      const originalParent = tooltip.parentElement;
      let isTooltipInBody = false;

      // Find the parent product card and overlay to keep them visible
      const productCard = wrapper.closest('.product-card') || wrapper.closest('.grid-view-item');
      const quickAddOverlay = wrapper.closest('.quick-add-overlay');
      const quickAddWrapper = wrapper.closest('.product-card__quick-add-wrapper');

      // Store original text for restoration
      const agreementTextEl = tooltipContent.querySelector('.preorder-agreement-text');
      const agreementLabel = tooltipContent.querySelector('.preorder-agreement-label');
      const cartConflictEl = tooltipContent.querySelector('.preorder-cart-conflict');
      const originalText = agreementTextEl ? agreementTextEl.innerHTML : '';
      if (agreementTextEl) agreementTextEl.setAttribute('data-original-text', originalText);

      // Cache for cart check results - shared across all tooltips
      let cachedCartStatus = null;
      let cartCheckPromise = null;
      let lastCheckTime = 0;
      let cachedVersion = 0; // Track which global version the cache was created with
      const CACHE_DURATION = 5000; // 5 seconds

      // Function to check cart for preorder conflicts
      async function checkCartForConflicts() {
        const productId = tooltip.getAttribute('data-product-id');
        const linkId = tooltip.getAttribute('data-link-id') || '';
        const productUrl = tooltip.getAttribute('data-product-url') || '';

        try {
          const response = await fetch('/cart.js');
          const cart = await response.json();

          let hasConflictingPreorder = false;
          let hasInStockItems = false;

          for (const item of cart.items) {
            // Skip if it's the same product
            if (item.product_id == productId) continue;

            // Check if the item is a preorder (we check via properties or product type)
            // We need to check the item's product collections via another fetch
            const itemLinkId = item.properties && item.properties['link_id'] ? item.properties['link_id'] : '';

            // For preorder detection, we'll check if item has preorder-related properties
            // or belongs to preorder collections. Since we can't easily check collections from cart.js,
            // we'll make an additional fetch for the product
            const productResponse = await fetch(`/products/${item.handle}.js`);
            const productData = await productResponse.json();

            // Check if this product is a preorder by checking its tags or collections
            const isPreorder = productData.tags && (
              productData.tags.includes('preorder') ||
              productData.tags.includes('Preorder') ||
              productData.tags.includes('group-buy') ||
              productData.tags.includes('Group Buy')
            );

            // Also check product type or other indicators
            const productLinkId = productData.metafields?.airf?.link_id || '';

            if (isPreorder) {
              // If both have link_ids and they match, it's compatible
              if (linkId && productLinkId && linkId === productLinkId) {
                continue; // Compatible, same link_id
              }
              // Otherwise, it's a conflicting preorder
              hasConflictingPreorder = true;
              break;
            } else {
              // In-stock item in cart
              hasInStockItems = true;
            }
          }

          return { hasConflictingPreorder, hasInStockItems, cartCount: cart.item_count };
        } catch (error) {
          console.error('Error checking cart:', error);
          return { hasConflictingPreorder: false, hasInStockItems: false, cartCount: 0 };
        }
      }

      // Function to update tooltip based on cart state
      function updateTooltipForConflict(hasConflict, hasInStockItems) {
        const quickAddBtn = wrapper.querySelector('.quick-add-btn[data-preorder="true"]');

        if (hasConflict) {
          // Show conflict message
          if (agreementTextEl) {
            agreementTextEl.innerHTML = 'You currently have a preorder item in your cart. Since it will ship at a different date than this product, you will need to purchase them separately.';
          }
          if (agreementLabel) agreementLabel.style.display = 'none';
          if (cartConflictEl) cartConflictEl.style.display = 'block';
          if (quickAddBtn) {
            quickAddBtn.disabled = true;
            quickAddBtn.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
          }
          tooltip.classList.add('has-conflict');
        } else if (hasInStockItems) {
          // Show in-stock conflict message
          if (agreementTextEl) {
            agreementTextEl.innerHTML = 'You currently have in stock items in your cart. Since they will ship at a different date than this preorder, you will need to purchase them separately.';
          }
          if (agreementLabel) agreementLabel.style.display = 'none';
          if (cartConflictEl) cartConflictEl.style.display = 'block';
          if (quickAddBtn) {
            quickAddBtn.disabled = true;
            quickAddBtn.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
          }
          tooltip.classList.add('has-conflict');
        } else {
          // Restore original state - but don't touch button disabled state
          // The checkbox change handler controls that
          if (agreementTextEl && agreementTextEl.getAttribute('data-original-text')) {
            agreementTextEl.innerHTML = agreementTextEl.getAttribute('data-original-text');
          }
          if (agreementLabel) agreementLabel.style.display = '';
          if (cartConflictEl) cartConflictEl.style.display = 'none';
          tooltip.classList.remove('has-conflict');
        }
      }

      // Function to get or fetch cart status
      async function getCartStatus() {
        const now = Date.now();

        // Invalidate cache if global version has changed (cart was modified)
        if (cachedVersion !== globalCacheVersion) {
          cachedCartStatus = null;
          cartCheckPromise = null;
        }

        // If we have a recent cached result, use it
        if (cachedCartStatus && (now - lastCheckTime) < CACHE_DURATION) {
          return cachedCartStatus;
        }

        // If there's already a check in progress, wait for it
        if (cartCheckPromise) {
          return cartCheckPromise;
        }

        // Start a new check
        cartCheckPromise = checkCartForConflicts();
        const result = await cartCheckPromise;
        cachedCartStatus = result;
        lastCheckTime = Date.now();
        cachedVersion = globalCacheVersion; // Store the version this cache was created with
        cartCheckPromise = null;
        return result;
      }

      // Function to show tooltip at correct position
      async function showTooltip() {
        const button = wrapper.querySelector('.quick-add-btn');
        if (!button) return;

        // Close all other open tooltips first (prevents multiple tooltips staying open)
        document.querySelectorAll('.preorder-tooltip.visible').forEach(otherTooltip => {
          if (otherTooltip !== tooltip) {
            otherTooltip.classList.remove('visible');
          }
        });
        document.querySelectorAll('.product-card.tooltip-active, .grid-view-item.tooltip-active').forEach(card => {
          if (card !== productCard) {
            card.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
          }
        });
        document.querySelectorAll('.quick-add-overlay.tooltip-active').forEach(overlay => {
          if (overlay !== quickAddOverlay) {
            overlay.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
          }
        });
        document.querySelectorAll('.product-card__quick-add-wrapper.tooltip-active').forEach(wrap => {
          if (wrap !== quickAddWrapper) {
            wrap.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
          }
        });

        // Ensure active classes are set (may already be set by mouseenter)
        if (productCard) productCard.classList.add('tooltip-active');
        if (quickAddOverlay) quickAddOverlay.classList.add('tooltip-active');
        if (quickAddWrapper) quickAddWrapper.classList.add('tooltip-active');

        // Move tooltip to body to escape all transforms and overflow containers
        if (!isTooltipInBody) {
          document.body.appendChild(tooltip);
          isTooltipInBody = true;
        }

        // Enable pointer-events immediately so mouse events register on tooltip
        tooltip.style.pointerEvents = 'auto';

        // Wait for any pending cart operation to complete first
        if (addToCartInProgress) {
          await addToCartInProgress;
        }

        // Determine content BEFORE showing tooltip (use cached result if available AND valid)
        // Only use cached data if the version matches (cache not invalidated)
        if (cachedCartStatus && cachedVersion === globalCacheVersion) {
          updateTooltipForConflict(cachedCartStatus.hasConflictingPreorder, cachedCartStatus.hasInStockItems && cachedCartStatus.cartCount > 0);
        }

        // Start/continue async check to update cache in background
        getCartStatus().then(cartStatus => {
          // Always update with fresh data
          updateTooltipForConflict(cartStatus.hasConflictingPreorder, cartStatus.hasInStockItems && cartStatus.cartCount > 0);
        });

        const buttonRect = button.getBoundingClientRect();
        const viewportWidth = window.innerWidth;
        const buttonCenterX = buttonRect.left + (buttonRect.width / 2);

        // Position tooltip above button
        let tooltipLeft = buttonCenterX;
        tooltip.style.position = 'fixed';
        tooltip.style.left = tooltipLeft + 'px';
        tooltip.style.bottom = (window.innerHeight - buttonRect.top + 10) + 'px';
        tooltip.style.top = 'auto';
        tooltip.style.right = 'auto';

        // Reset arrow offset initially
        tooltip.style.setProperty('--arrow-offset', '0px');

        // Show tooltip
        tooltip.classList.add('visible');

        // Edge detection - run once after render
        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
          const tooltipRect = tooltip.getBoundingClientRect();

          if (tooltipRect.right > viewportWidth - 10) {
            tooltipLeft -= (tooltipRect.right - viewportWidth + 10);
          } else if (tooltipRect.left < 10) {
            tooltipLeft += (10 - tooltipRect.left);
          }

          tooltip.style.left = tooltipLeft + 'px';

          // Calculate arrow offset to keep it pointing at button center
          const arrowOffset = buttonCenterX - tooltipLeft;
          tooltip.style.setProperty('--arrow-offset', arrowOffset + 'px');
        });
      }

      let isShowing = false;

      // Pre-fetch cart status on page load
      setTimeout(() => {
        getCartStatus();
      }, 100);

      // Reset state when tooltips are globally closed
      document.addEventListener('tooltips:closed', function() {
        isShowing = false;
        if (isTooltipInBody) {
          originalParent.appendChild(tooltip);
          isTooltipInBody = false;
        }
      });

      // Hide tooltip
      function hideTooltip() {
        isShowing = false;
        tooltip.classList.remove('visible');
        if (productCard) productCard.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
        if (quickAddOverlay) quickAddOverlay.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
        if (quickAddWrapper) quickAddWrapper.classList.remove('tooltip-active');

        setTimeout(() => {
          if (isTooltipInBody && !isShowing) {
            originalParent.appendChild(tooltip);
            isTooltipInBody = false;
          }
        }, 300);
      }

      // Desktop: show on hover
      wrapper.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() {
        if (productCard) productCard.classList.add('tooltip-active');
        if (quickAddOverlay) quickAddOverlay.classList.add('tooltip-active');
        if (quickAddWrapper) quickAddWrapper.classList.add('tooltip-active');
        showTooltip();
        isShowing = true;
      });

      wrapper.addEventListener('mouseleave', function(e) {
        // Don't hide if moving to tooltip
        if (e.relatedTarget && (e.relatedTarget === tooltip || tooltip.contains(e.relatedTarget))) return;
        hideTooltip();
      });

      tooltip.addEventListener('mouseleave', function(e) {
        // Don't hide if moving back to wrapper
        if (e.relatedTarget && (e.relatedTarget === wrapper || wrapper.contains(e.relatedTarget))) return;
        hideTooltip();
      });

      // Mobile: show on click/tap - handle both click and touchend
      function handleWrapperTap(e) {
        if (!tooltip.classList.contains('visible')) {
          e.preventDefault();
          e.stopPropagation();
          if (productCard) productCard.classList.add('tooltip-active');
          if (quickAddOverlay) quickAddOverlay.classList.add('tooltip-active');
          if (quickAddWrapper) quickAddWrapper.classList.add('tooltip-active');
          showTooltip();
          isShowing = true;
        }
      }
      wrapper.addEventListener('click', handleWrapperTap);
      wrapper.addEventListener('touchend', handleWrapperTap);
    });
  });
})();
         </script>

         <!-- close product-card__quick-add-wrapper -->
         <script>
          (function() {
  // Only initialize once - this script runs per product card
  if (window.productCardScriptInitialized) return;
  window.productCardScriptInitialized = true;

  // Handle preorder agreement checkboxes - use event delegation for tooltips moved to body
  document.addEventListener('change', function(e) {
    if (!e.target.classList.contains('preorder-agreement-checkbox')) return;

    const checkbox = e.target;
    const productId = checkbox.getAttribute('data-product-id');
    const quickAddBtn = document.querySelector(`.quick-add-btn[data-product-id="${productId}"][data-preorder="true"]`);

    if (quickAddBtn) {
      if (checkbox.checked) {
        quickAddBtn.disabled = false;
        quickAddBtn.style.cursor = 'pointer';
      } else {
        quickAddBtn.disabled = true;
        quickAddBtn.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
      }
    }
  });

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {

    // Function to close all open tooltips and reset state - make it global
    window.closeAllTooltips = function() {
      const visibleTooltips = document.querySelectorAll('.preorder-tooltip.visible, .instock-conflict-tooltip.visible');

      visibleTooltips.forEach(tooltip => {
        tooltip.classList.remove('visible');
        // Reset pointer-events so tooltip doesn't block taps on wrapper below
        tooltip.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
      });

      document.querySelectorAll('.tooltip-active').forEach(el => {
        el.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
      });

      // Re-enable in-stock conflict buttons
      const disabledBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.quick-add-btn.instock-conflict-disabled');

      disabledBtns.forEach(btn => {
        btn.classList.remove('instock-conflict-disabled');
        btn.classList.remove('error');
        btn.classList.remove('loading');
        btn.disabled = false;
      });

      document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('tooltips:closed'));
    };

    // Global click handler to close orphaned tooltips when clicking outside
    document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      // Don't close if clicking inside a tooltip or quick-add area
      if (e.target.closest('.preorder-tooltip') || e.target.closest('.instock-conflict-tooltip') || e.target.closest('.quick-add-btn-wrapper')) {
        return;
      }
      window.closeAllTooltips();
    });

    // Close tooltips on scroll - immediate for responsiveness
    window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
      window.closeAllTooltips();
    }, { passive: true });

    // Global cart preorder check - shared across all products
    let globalCartHasPreorder = false;
    let globalCartCheckPromise = null;

    // Global cache version - incremented when cart changes to invalidate all caches
    let globalCacheVersion = 0;

    // Track when add-to-cart is in progress so tooltips can wait
    let addToCartInProgress = null; // Will hold a promise that resolves when add-to-cart completes

    // Expose global function to invalidate cart conflict caches
    // triggerCheck: if true, immediately start a fresh check; if false, just invalidate
    window.invalidateCartConflictCache = function(triggerCheck = true) {
      globalCacheVersion++;
      globalCartCheckPromise = null;
      // Trigger a fresh check if requested
      if (triggerCheck) {
        globalCartCheckPromise = checkCartForPreorders();
      }
    };

    // Expose function to signal add-to-cart started
    window.cartOperationStarted = function() {
      let resolveOperation;
      addToCartInProgress = new Promise(resolve => { resolveOperation = resolve; });
      return resolveOperation; // Return the resolve function to be called when complete
    };

    // Get the current add-to-cart promise (if any)
    window.getCartOperationPromise = function() {
      return addToCartInProgress;
    };

    // Clear the add-to-cart promise
    window.cartOperationCompleted = function() {
      addToCartInProgress = null;
    };

    // Expose function to check if cart has preorder (for blocking in-stock adds)
    window.checkCartHasPreorder = async function() {
      // If we already know from cache and it's recent, use that
      if (globalCartCheckPromise) {
        return await globalCartCheckPromise;
      }
      // Otherwise do a fresh check
      globalCartCheckPromise = checkCartForPreorders();
      return await globalCartCheckPromise;
    };

    async function checkCartForPreorders() {
      try {
        const response = await fetch('/cart.js');
        const cart = await response.json();

        if (cart.item_count === 0) {
          globalCartHasPreorder = false;
          return false;
        }

        // Check each item for preorder property (set when adding preorder items to cart)
        for (const item of cart.items) {
          // Check for _preorder property which is set when adding preorder/group-buy items
          if (item.properties && item.properties._preorder === 'true') {
            globalCartHasPreorder = true;
            return true;
          }
        }

        globalCartHasPreorder = false;
        return false;
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error checking cart for preorders:', error);
        return false;
      }
    }

    // Clear cart functionality
    async function clearCart() {
      // IMMEDIATELY invalidate cache when cart operation starts
      // This prevents race conditions where hover checks return stale data
      globalCartCheckPromise = null;
      globalCacheVersion++;

      // Signal cart operation started (so hover handlers wait)
      let completeOperation = null;
      if (window.cartOperationStarted) {
        completeOperation = window.cartOperationStarted();
      }

      try {
        const response = await fetch('/cart/clear.js', {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
        });

        if (response.ok) {
          // Reset global cart state
          globalCartHasPreorder = false;

          // Update cart count display
          const cartCountEl = document.querySelector('#CartCount');
          if (cartCountEl) {
            const countSpan = cartCountEl.querySelector('span:first-child');
            if (countSpan) countSpan.textContent = '0';
            cartCountEl.classList.add('hidden-count');
          }
          document.querySelectorAll('[data-cart-count], .cart-count').forEach(el => {
            el.textContent = '0';
          });

          // Reset all conflict states
          resetAllConflictStates();

          // Signal cart operation completed
          if (completeOperation) completeOperation();
          if (window.cartOperationCompleted) window.cartOperationCompleted();

          return true;
        }

        // Signal cart operation completed (even on non-ok response)
        if (completeOperation) completeOperation();
        if (window.cartOperationCompleted) window.cartOperationCompleted();

        return false;
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error clearing cart:', error);

        // Signal cart operation completed (even on error)
        if (completeOperation) completeOperation();
        if (window.cartOperationCompleted) window.cartOperationCompleted();

        return false;
      }
    }

    // Reset all conflict states across all product cards
    function resetAllConflictStates() {
      // Reset preorder tooltips
      document.querySelectorAll('.preorder-tooltip').forEach(tooltip => {
        tooltip.classList.remove('has-conflict', 'visible');
        const agreementText = tooltip.querySelector('.preorder-agreement-text');
        const agreementLabel = tooltip.querySelector('.preorder-agreement-label');
        const conflictEl = tooltip.querySelector('.preorder-cart-conflict');
        const originalText = agreementText?.getAttribute('data-original-text');

        if (agreementText && originalText) agreementText.innerHTML = originalText;
        if (agreementLabel) agreementLabel.style.display = '';
        if (conflictEl) conflictEl.style.display = 'none';
      });

      // Reset in-stock conflict tooltips
      document.querySelectorAll('.instock-conflict-tooltip').forEach(tooltip => {
        tooltip.classList.remove('visible');
        tooltip.style.display = 'none';
      });

      // Reset preorder buttons to require checkbox again
      document.querySelectorAll('.quick-add-btn--preorder').forEach(btn => {
        const checkbox = document.querySelector(`.preorder-agreement-checkbox[data-product-id="${btn.dataset.productId}"]`);
        if (checkbox) {
          btn.disabled = !checkbox.checked;
          btn.style.cursor = checkbox.checked ? 'pointer' : 'not-allowed';
        }
      });

      // Reset in-stock buttons
      document.querySelectorAll('.quick-add-btn.instock-conflict-disabled').forEach(btn => {
        btn.classList.remove('instock-conflict-disabled');
        btn.disabled = false;
      });

      // Remove tooltip-active classes
      document.querySelectorAll('.tooltip-active').forEach(el => {
        el.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
      });
    }

    // Handle clear cart button clicks
    document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      const clearBtn = e.target.closest('.preorder-clear-cart-btn');
      if (!clearBtn) return;

      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();

      clearBtn.classList.add('loading');
      clearBtn.textContent = 'Clearing...';

      clearCart().then(success => {
        clearBtn.classList.remove('loading');
        clearBtn.textContent = 'Clear Cart';

        if (success) {
          const tooltip = clearBtn.closest('.preorder-tooltip, .instock-conflict-tooltip');

          if (tooltip) {
            // Check if this is an in-stock conflict tooltip
            if (tooltip.classList.contains('instock-conflict-tooltip')) {
              // For in-stock items: hide tooltip and enable button
              tooltip.classList.remove('visible');
              tooltip.style.display = 'none';

              // Find and enable the add-to-cart button using product ID
              const productId = tooltip.dataset.productId;
              const productCard = document.querySelector(`.product-card[data-product-id="${productId}"], .grid-view-item[data-product-id="${productId}"]`);
              if (productCard) {
                const btn = productCard.querySelector('.quick-add-btn:not(.quick-add-btn--preorder)');
                if (btn) {
                  btn.classList.remove('instock-conflict-disabled');
                  btn.disabled = false;
                }
                productCard.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
                const overlay = productCard.querySelector('.quick-add-overlay');
                if (overlay) overlay.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
                const wrapper = productCard.querySelector('.product-card__quick-add-wrapper');
                if (wrapper) wrapper.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
              }
            } else {
              // For preorder items: restore original agreement content
              tooltip.classList.remove('has-conflict');
              const agreementText = tooltip.querySelector('.preorder-agreement-text');
              const agreementLabel = tooltip.querySelector('.preorder-agreement-label');
              const conflictEl = tooltip.querySelector('.preorder-cart-conflict');
              const checkbox = tooltip.querySelector('.preorder-agreement-checkbox');

              // Restore original text
              if (agreementText && agreementText.dataset.originalText) {
                agreementText.innerHTML = agreementText.dataset.originalText;
              }

              // Show agreement label, hide conflict buttons
              if (agreementLabel) agreementLabel.style.display = '';
              if (conflictEl) conflictEl.style.display = 'none';

              // Reset checkbox and button state
              if (checkbox) {
                checkbox.checked = false;
                const productId = checkbox.dataset.productId;
                const addBtn = document.querySelector(`.quick-add-btn[data-product-id="${productId}"][data-preorder="true"]`);
                if (addBtn) {
                  addBtn.disabled = true;
                  addBtn.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      });
    });

    // Handle in-stock conflict tooltips (simplified)
    const instockConflictTooltips = document.querySelectorAll('.instock-conflict-tooltip');

    instockConflictTooltips.forEach(function(tooltip) {
      const wrapper = tooltip.closest('.quick-add-btn-wrapper');
      if (!wrapper) return;

      const button = wrapper.querySelector('.quick-add-btn:not(.quick-add-btn--preorder)');
      if (!button) return;

      const productCard = wrapper.closest('.product-card') || wrapper.closest('.grid-view-item');
      const quickAddOverlay = wrapper.closest('.quick-add-overlay');
      const originalParent = tooltip.parentElement;
      let isTooltipInBody = false;
      let lastCheckedVersion = -1;
      let isShowing = false;

      // Reset state when tooltips are globally closed
      document.addEventListener('tooltips:closed', function() {
        isShowing = false;
        if (isTooltipInBody) {
          originalParent.appendChild(tooltip);
          isTooltipInBody = false;
        }
      });

      // Show tooltip and position it
      async function showTooltip() {
        if (isShowing) return;
        isShowing = true;

        // Wait for any pending cart operation
        if (addToCartInProgress) {
          await addToCartInProgress;
        }

        // Check for preorder in cart
        if (lastCheckedVersion !== globalCacheVersion) {
          globalCartCheckPromise = checkCartForPreorders();
          lastCheckedVersion = globalCacheVersion;
        } else if (!globalCartCheckPromise) {
          globalCartCheckPromise = checkCartForPreorders();
        }

        const hasPreorder = await globalCartCheckPromise;

        if (!hasPreorder) {
          button.classList.remove('instock-conflict-disabled');
          button.disabled = false;
          isShowing = false;
          return;
        }

        // Show conflict tooltip
        button.classList.add('instock-conflict-disabled');
        button.disabled = true;
        tooltip.style.display = 'block';

        if (!isTooltipInBody) {
          document.body.appendChild(tooltip);
          isTooltipInBody = true;
        }

        // Position tooltip
        const buttonRect = button.getBoundingClientRect();
        const viewportWidth = window.innerWidth;
        const buttonCenterX = buttonRect.left + buttonRect.width / 2;
        let tooltipLeft = buttonCenterX;

        tooltip.style.position = 'fixed';
        tooltip.style.left = tooltipLeft + 'px';
        tooltip.style.bottom = (window.innerHeight - buttonRect.top + 10) + 'px';
        tooltip.style.pointerEvents = 'auto';

        // Reset arrow offset initially
        tooltip.style.setProperty('--arrow-offset', '0px');

        // Add active classes
        if (productCard) productCard.classList.add('tooltip-active');
        if (quickAddOverlay) quickAddOverlay.classList.add('tooltip-active');

        tooltip.classList.add('visible');

        // Edge detection - run once after render
        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
          const tooltipRect = tooltip.getBoundingClientRect();

          if (tooltipRect.right > viewportWidth - 10) {
            tooltipLeft -= (tooltipRect.right - viewportWidth + 10);
          } else if (tooltipRect.left < 10) {
            tooltipLeft += (10 - tooltipRect.left);
          }

          tooltip.style.left = tooltipLeft + 'px';

          // Calculate arrow offset to keep it pointing at button center
          const arrowOffset = buttonCenterX - tooltipLeft;
          tooltip.style.setProperty('--arrow-offset', arrowOffset + 'px');
        });
      }

      // Hide tooltip
      function hideTooltip() {
        isShowing = false;
        tooltip.classList.remove('visible');
        if (productCard) productCard.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
        if (quickAddOverlay) quickAddOverlay.classList.remove('tooltip-active');

        setTimeout(() => {
          if (isTooltipInBody && !isShowing) {
            originalParent.appendChild(tooltip);
            isTooltipInBody = false;
          }
        }, 300);
      }

      // Desktop: show on hover
      wrapper.addEventListener('mouseenter', showTooltip);
      wrapper.addEventListener('mouseleave', function(e) {
        // Don't hide if moving to tooltip
        if (e.relatedTarget && (e.relatedTarget === tooltip || tooltip.contains(e.relatedTarget))) return;
        hideTooltip();
      });

      tooltip.addEventListener('mouseleave', function(e) {
        // Don't hide if moving back to wrapper
        if (e.relatedTarget && (e.relatedTarget === wrapper || wrapper.contains(e.relatedTarget))) return;
        hideTooltip();
      });
    });

    // Pre-fetch cart preorder status on page load
    setTimeout(() => {
      globalCartCheckPromise = checkCartForPreorders();
    }, 200);

    // Handle tooltip edge detection and repositioning
    const tooltipWrappers = document.querySelectorAll('.quick-add-btn-wrapper');

    tooltipWrappers.forEach(function(wrapper, index) {
      const tooltip = wrapper.querySelector('.preorder-tooltip');
      if (!tooltip) return;

      const tooltipContent = tooltip.querySelector('.preorder-tooltip-content');
      if (!tooltipContent) return;

      // Store original parent for returning tooltip
      const originalParent = tooltip.parentElement;
      let isTooltipInBody = false;

      // Find the parent product card and overlay to keep them visible
      const productCard = wrapper.closest('.product-card') || wrapper.closest('.grid-view-item');
      const quickAddOverlay = wrapper.closest('.quick-add-overlay');
      const quickAddWrapper = wrapper.closest('.product-card__quick-add-wrapper');

      // Store original text for restoration
      const agreementTextEl = tooltipContent.querySelector('.preorder-agreement-text');
      const agreementLabel = tooltipContent.querySelector('.preorder-agreement-label');
      const cartConflictEl = tooltipContent.querySelector('.preorder-cart-conflict');
      const originalText = agreementTextEl ? agreementTextEl.innerHTML : '';
      if (agreementTextEl) agreementTextEl.setAttribute('data-original-text', originalText);

      // Cache for cart check results - shared across all tooltips
      let cachedCartStatus = null;
      let cartCheckPromise = null;
      let lastCheckTime = 0;
      let cachedVersion = 0; // Track which global version the cache was created with
      const CACHE_DURATION = 5000; // 5 seconds

      // Function to check cart for preorder conflicts
      async function checkCartForConflicts() {
        const productId = tooltip.getAttribute('data-product-id');
        const linkId = tooltip.getAttribute('data-link-id') || '';
        const productUrl = tooltip.getAttribute('data-product-url') || '';

        try {
          const response = await fetch('/cart.js');
          const cart = await response.json();

          let hasConflictingPreorder = false;
          let hasInStockItems = false;

          for (const item of cart.items) {
            // Skip if it's the same product
            if (item.product_id == productId) continue;

            // Check if the item is a preorder (we check via properties or product type)
            // We need to check the item's product collections via another fetch
            const itemLinkId = item.properties && item.properties['link_id'] ? item.properties['link_id'] : '';

            // For preorder detection, we'll check if item has preorder-related properties
            // or belongs to preorder collections. Since we can't easily check collections from cart.js,
            // we'll make an additional fetch for the product
            const productResponse = await fetch(`/products/${item.handle}.js`);
            const productData = await productResponse.json();

            // Check if this product is a preorder by checking its tags or collections
            const isPreorder = productData.tags && (
              productData.tags.includes('preorder') ||
              productData.tags.includes('Preorder') ||
              productData.tags.includes('group-buy') ||
              productData.tags.includes('Group Buy')
            );

            // Also check product type or other indicators
            const productLinkId = productData.metafields?.airf?.link_id || '';

            if (isPreorder) {
              // If both have link_ids and they match, it's compatible
              if (linkId && productLinkId && linkId === productLinkId) {
                continue; // Compatible, same link_id
              }
              // Otherwise, it's a conflicting preorder
              hasConflictingPreorder = true;
              break;
            } else {
              // In-stock item in cart
              hasInStockItems = true;
            }
          }

          return { hasConflictingPreorder, hasInStockItems, cartCount: cart.item_count };
        } catch (error) {
          console.error('Error checking cart:', error);
          return { hasConflictingPreorder: false, hasInStockItems: false, cartCount: 0 };
        }
      }

      // Function to update tooltip based on cart state
      function updateTooltipForConflict(hasConflict, hasInStockItems) {
        const quickAddBtn = wrapper.querySelector('.quick-add-btn[data-preorder="true"]');

        if (hasConflict) {
          // Show conflict message
          if (agreementTextEl) {
            agreementTextEl.innerHTML = 'You currently have a preorder item in your cart. Since it will ship at a different date than this product, you will need to purchase them separately.';
          }
          if (agreementLabel) agreementLabel.style.display = 'none';
          if (cartConflictEl) cartConflictEl.style.display = 'block';
          if (quickAddBtn) {
            quickAddBtn.disabled = true;
            quickAddBtn.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
          }
          tooltip.classList.add('has-conflict');
        } else if (hasInStockItems) {
          // Show in-stock conflict message
          if (agreementTextEl) {
            agreementTextEl.innerHTML = 'You currently have in stock items in your cart. Since they will ship at a different date than this preorder, you will need to purchase them separately.';
          }
          if (agreementLabel) agreementLabel.style.display = 'none';
          if (cartConflictEl) cartConflictEl.style.display = 'block';
          if (quickAddBtn) {
            quickAddBtn.disabled = true;
            quickAddBtn.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
          }
          tooltip.classList.add('has-conflict');
        } else {
          // Restore original state - but don't touch button disabled state
          // The checkbox change handler controls that
          if (agreementTextEl && agreementTextEl.getAttribute('data-original-text')) {
            agreementTextEl.innerHTML = agreementTextEl.getAttribute('data-original-text');
          }
          if (agreementLabel) agreementLabel.style.display = '';
          if (cartConflictEl) cartConflictEl.style.display = 'none';
          tooltip.classList.remove('has-conflict');
        }
      }

      // Function to get or fetch cart status
      async function getCartStatus() {
        const now = Date.now();

        // Invalidate cache if global version has changed (cart was modified)
        if (cachedVersion !== globalCacheVersion) {
          cachedCartStatus = null;
          cartCheckPromise = null;
        }

        // If we have a recent cached result, use it
        if (cachedCartStatus && (now - lastCheckTime) < CACHE_DURATION) {
          return cachedCartStatus;
        }

        // If there's already a check in progress, wait for it
        if (cartCheckPromise) {
          return cartCheckPromise;
        }

        // Start a new check
        cartCheckPromise = checkCartForConflicts();
        const result = await cartCheckPromise;
        cachedCartStatus = result;
        lastCheckTime = Date.now();
        cachedVersion = globalCacheVersion; // Store the version this cache was created with
        cartCheckPromise = null;
        return result;
      }

      // Function to show tooltip at correct position
      async function showTooltip() {
        const button = wrapper.querySelector('.quick-add-btn');
        if (!button) return;

        // Close all other open tooltips first (prevents multiple tooltips staying open)
        document.querySelectorAll('.preorder-tooltip.visible').forEach(otherTooltip => {
          if (otherTooltip !== tooltip) {
            otherTooltip.classList.remove('visible');
          }
        });
        document.querySelectorAll('.product-card.tooltip-active, .grid-view-item.tooltip-active').forEach(card => {
          if (card !== productCard) {
            card.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
          }
        });
        document.querySelectorAll('.quick-add-overlay.tooltip-active').forEach(overlay => {
          if (overlay !== quickAddOverlay) {
            overlay.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
          }
        });
        document.querySelectorAll('.product-card__quick-add-wrapper.tooltip-active').forEach(wrap => {
          if (wrap !== quickAddWrapper) {
            wrap.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
          }
        });

        // Ensure active classes are set (may already be set by mouseenter)
        if (productCard) productCard.classList.add('tooltip-active');
        if (quickAddOverlay) quickAddOverlay.classList.add('tooltip-active');
        if (quickAddWrapper) quickAddWrapper.classList.add('tooltip-active');

        // Move tooltip to body to escape all transforms and overflow containers
        if (!isTooltipInBody) {
          document.body.appendChild(tooltip);
          isTooltipInBody = true;
        }

        // Enable pointer-events immediately so mouse events register on tooltip
        tooltip.style.pointerEvents = 'auto';

        // Wait for any pending cart operation to complete first
        if (addToCartInProgress) {
          await addToCartInProgress;
        }

        // Determine content BEFORE showing tooltip (use cached result if available AND valid)
        // Only use cached data if the version matches (cache not invalidated)
        if (cachedCartStatus && cachedVersion === globalCacheVersion) {
          updateTooltipForConflict(cachedCartStatus.hasConflictingPreorder, cachedCartStatus.hasInStockItems && cachedCartStatus.cartCount > 0);
        }

        // Start/continue async check to update cache in background
        getCartStatus().then(cartStatus => {
          // Always update with fresh data
          updateTooltipForConflict(cartStatus.hasConflictingPreorder, cartStatus.hasInStockItems && cartStatus.cartCount > 0);
        });

        const buttonRect = button.getBoundingClientRect();
        const viewportWidth = window.innerWidth;
        const buttonCenterX = buttonRect.left + (buttonRect.width / 2);

        // Position tooltip above button
        let tooltipLeft = buttonCenterX;
        tooltip.style.position = 'fixed';
        tooltip.style.left = tooltipLeft + 'px';
        tooltip.style.bottom = (window.innerHeight - buttonRect.top + 10) + 'px';
        tooltip.style.top = 'auto';
        tooltip.style.right = 'auto';

        // Reset arrow offset initially
        tooltip.style.setProperty('--arrow-offset', '0px');

        // Show tooltip
        tooltip.classList.add('visible');

        // Edge detection - run once after render
        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
          const tooltipRect = tooltip.getBoundingClientRect();

          if (tooltipRect.right > viewportWidth - 10) {
            tooltipLeft -= (tooltipRect.right - viewportWidth + 10);
          } else if (tooltipRect.left < 10) {
            tooltipLeft += (10 - tooltipRect.left);
          }

          tooltip.style.left = tooltipLeft + 'px';

          // Calculate arrow offset to keep it pointing at button center
          const arrowOffset = buttonCenterX - tooltipLeft;
          tooltip.style.setProperty('--arrow-offset', arrowOffset + 'px');
        });
      }

      let isShowing = false;

      // Pre-fetch cart status on page load
      setTimeout(() => {
        getCartStatus();
      }, 100);

      // Reset state when tooltips are globally closed
      document.addEventListener('tooltips:closed', function() {
        isShowing = false;
        if (isTooltipInBody) {
          originalParent.appendChild(tooltip);
          isTooltipInBody = false;
        }
      });

      // Hide tooltip
      function hideTooltip() {
        isShowing = false;
        tooltip.classList.remove('visible');
        if (productCard) productCard.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
        if (quickAddOverlay) quickAddOverlay.classList.remove('tooltip-active');
        if (quickAddWrapper) quickAddWrapper.classList.remove('tooltip-active');

        setTimeout(() => {
          if (isTooltipInBody && !isShowing) {
            originalParent.appendChild(tooltip);
            isTooltipInBody = false;
          }
        }, 300);
      }

      // Desktop: show on hover
      wrapper.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() {
        if (productCard) productCard.classList.add('tooltip-active');
        if (quickAddOverlay) quickAddOverlay.classList.add('tooltip-active');
        if (quickAddWrapper) quickAddWrapper.classList.add('tooltip-active');
        showTooltip();
        isShowing = true;
      });

      wrapper.addEventListener('mouseleave', function(e) {
        // Don't hide if moving to tooltip
        if (e.relatedTarget && (e.relatedTarget === tooltip || tooltip.contains(e.relatedTarget))) return;
        hideTooltip();
      });

      tooltip.addEventListener('mouseleave', function(e) {
        // Don't hide if moving back to wrapper
        if (e.relatedTarget && (e.relatedTarget === wrapper || wrapper.contains(e.relatedTarget))) return;
        hideTooltip();
      });

      // Mobile: show on click/tap - handle both click and touchend
      function handleWrapperTap(e) {
        if (!tooltip.classList.contains('visible')) {
          e.preventDefault();
          e.stopPropagation();
          if (productCard) productCard.classList.add('tooltip-active');
          if (quickAddOverlay) quickAddOverlay.classList.add('tooltip-active');
          if (quickAddWrapper) quickAddWrapper.classList.add('tooltip-active');
          showTooltip();
          isShowing = true;
        }
      }
      wrapper.addEventListener('click', handleWrapperTap);
      wrapper.addEventListener('touchend', handleWrapperTap);
    });
  });
})();
         </script>
         <div class="grid-view-item product-card" data-product-available="false" data-product-id="8730434568359" data-product-title="GMK CYL Fabrik" data-product-url="/collections/keycaps/products/gmk-cyl-blue-fabrik-keycaps" data-restocking="" style="border-radius: 5px; padding-top: 0px; max-width: 2500px; position: relative;">
          <div class="product-card__quick-add-wrapper" style="position: relative; overflow: visible;">
